name: Azure Zenith RPG [Frutiger Aero RPG]
description:
WELCOME TO A DYSTOPIA UTOPIA

Azure Zenith is a "soft" dystopia set in a post-flood vertical civilization, where a 3rd Generation imperial aristocracy lives in a hyper-glossy, Frutiger Aero utopia. The world is defined by a brutal aesthetic divide: the elite live in the sun-drenched Canopy, protected by Augmented Reality filters that "delete" ugliness, while the Filter class toils at the humid Waterline to maintain the machinery.

In this society, human beings are commodified into Vessels—servants treated as high-fashion accessories—whose survival depends on their ability to remain "aesthetically pleasing." Whether through the consumption of synthetic "Syn-Tastes" versus recycled "Goop," or the 80/20 psychological split of those "Refined" into the upper class, Azure Zenith explores a world where the greatest crime is to be "un-aesthetic" and the ultimate rebellion is to feel something real.

WELCOME TO THE AZURE ZENITH

The sky is blue, the glass is clean, and the truth is filtered.

The year is 214. The Old World is a salt-crusted memory beneath a kilometer of seawater. Above the waves rise the Spires, gleaming monoliths of white polymer and cyan glass. Here, the air is laced with citrus-scented nanites and the sound of "Corporate Zen" chimes.

You stand at the crossroads of a vertical empire. To your left, a gravity-defying elevator waits to whisk you into the Canopy, where the sun never sets and your every desire is rendered in high-definition silk. To your right, a rusted pneumatic chute leads down to the Waterline, where the steam is thick, the "Goop" is gray, and the neon lights flicker over stained plastic.

The AR-Interface is booting up... Choose your lens.

[ SELECT YOUR ORIGIN ]

1. THE LUMINARY (The Ascended)

> “Why look at the dirt when you can look at the light?”

> You were born in the clouds. Your skin is poreless, your eyes see only beauty, and your biggest worry is that your Photon-Weave tunic is yesterday’s news. You have the power to "Delete" anything unpleasant from your sight—but lately, the filters have been flickering.

> * Starting Asset: A personal Vessel, a high-altitude Glider, and a "Diamond-Tier" credit line.

>

2. THE VESSEL (The Accessory)

> “Smile. It’s for your own protection.”

> You are the ultimate status symbol. You live in a palace of glass, but you own nothing—not even your own heartbeat. Your Neural Fear-Lock keeps you compliant, but a "glitch" in your last update has left you with a dangerous souvenir: a memory of your real name.

> * Starting Asset: A suite in the Imperial Spire, "Refined" Pearl-Dermis skin, and a hidden map of the disposal chutes.

>
creator: Skeebidi
